intended_use: The Uscan is for non-invasive imaging of the human body and is intended for the following applications: Abdominal, Musculoskeletal, Pediatric, Small Organ, and Peripheral Vessel. Users must have ultra
intended_use_full: The Uscan is for non-invasive imaging of the human body and is intended for the following applications: Abdominal, Musculoskeletal, Pediatric, Small Organ, and Peripheral Vessel. Users must have ultrasound training for abdominal, musculoskeletal, pediatric, small organ, and peripheral vessel imaging. The Uscan can also be used to obtain an image of the bladder that is used to automatically determine bladder volume.
target_condition: Various conditions requiring abdominal, musculoskeletal, pediatric, small organ, and peripheral vessel ultrasound imaging; bladder volume assessment
other_metrics: Imaging performance and measurement accuracy reported as substantially equivalent to predicate devices, but no specific quantitative metrics provided
